violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. In storage room
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in-coolers need cleaned of food debris. Big can opener needs cleaned. Table used for making pizza dough needs cleaned of debris.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in-freezers need cleaned inside and out (handles & Door).

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. All floors, walls, & ceilings are in need of a deep cleaning. Dishwashing area has some kind of mold on the wall behind the dishwasher that needs serious consideration. Walk-in-cooler needs cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. Several areas where sheet rock missing or broken in wall that need repaired to working order. Ceiling tiles have water or stain damage. Floor tiles broken or missing. Repair to working order.

Demonstration of knowledge by person in charge. — --Person in charge did not demonstrate adequate knowledge of the food service code requirements. Certified food manager did not demonstrate the necessary requirements for cleanliness as specified in the food code.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. A wet wiping cloth was stored on the stainless steel prep counter in the back. The sanitize buckets tested at 452 ppm for lactic acid. This should be at least 702 ppm lactic acid.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Several shelves in the walk in cooler were missing the rubber coating and were rusty. No longer a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact su was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelves in the pizza reach in cooler by the pizza oven need to be cleaned. The shelves in the walk in cooler, shelves in the chicken reach in cooler need to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. The back prep table still had food debris and was not cleaned adequately.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Catch trays on both levels of the pizza oven need to be cleaned. Gaskets and door jams on the pizza reach in cooler, the shelves above the pizza make cooler, gaskets and door jams of the pizza prep cooler and reach in cooler by the ice machine, the monitor in the kitchen, the lower shelf of the back prep counter, the fan guard for the walk in cooler fan, the bottom vent of the chicken reach in cooler, the green shelves by the fryers need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Box of 6/8 oz food containers was stored on the floor in the back storage area.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Pizza boxes on the lower shelf by the pizza oven were not inverted or covered.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Exposed studs are visible from the hole in the wall by the mop sink.--Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The new wall in the back prep area is unfinished sheet rock. Needs to be covered with a cleanable material, or painted. Floor in the back prep area is bare concrete.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walls and ceiling above the cactus bread station, the floor under the ice machine, the wall above the back prep table, the floor in the walk in freezer, floors and ceiling in the walk in cooler, the floors and walls in the dish area, the floor in the back stock area, the walls and ceilings by the fryers, and floors under the fryers need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Baseboard and wall board are missing at the bottom of the closet by the ice machine. Hole in the wall by the mop sink. Hole in the wall above the stainless steel table in the back room. Missing floor tile by the dish machine.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Adequate, shielded, maintained (1 pt deducted)
